allow: Bash(ssh 10.9.1.20 "docker inspect freepbx_server freepbx_mariadb 2>/dev/null | python3 -c \\"import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\('=== ' + c['Name'] + ' ==='\); print\('Image:', c['Config']['Image']\); print\('Env:', [e for e in c['Config']['Env'] if not any\(x in e for x in ['PASSWORD','SECRET','KEY']\)]\); print\('Ports:', c['HostConfig']['PortBindings']\); print\('Volumes:', c['HostConfig']['Binds']\); print\('Networks:', list\(c['NetworkSettings']['Networks'].keys\(\)\)\); print\(\) for c in data]\\"")
